subprograms.name: Check_Chip_Id

documentation.description: Read the chip ID and check that it matches

subprograms.name: Configure

documentation.description: Configure the sensor to use IRR filtering and/or SPI 3-wire mode

subprograms.name: Humidity

documentation.description: Get the humidity from raw values
Check if a measurement is in progress

subprograms.name: Pressure

documentation.description: Get the pressure from raw values

subprograms.name: Read_Calibration

documentation.description: Read the calibration constants from the sensor

subprograms.name: Read_Measurement

documentation.description: Read the raw measurement values from the sensor

subprograms.name: Reset

documentation.description: Issue a soft reset and wait until the chip is ready.

subprograms.name: Start

documentation.description:
Change sensor mode. Mainly used to start one measurement or enable
perpetual cycling of measurements and inactive periods.

subprograms.name: Temperature

documentation.description: Get the temperature from raw values in 0.1 Celsius
